Wait, that seems off. Let me calculate what each does.

That seems incorrect because if `seconds` was calculated as `offset / MILLIS_PER_SECOND`, subtracting `(seconds - MILLIS_PER_SECOND)` would actually add to the offset, possibly messing up the calculation.
